name: WW Carrot Muffins (No Fat)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Mix all ingredients in a large bowl until well combined.
3. Spray a 12-cup muffin tin with Pam cooking spray.
4. Divide the batter evenly among the muffin cups, filling each about 2/3 full.
5. Bake for 25 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center of a muffin comes out clean.
6. Remove from oven and let cool in the pan for 5 minutes before transferring to a wire rack to cool completely.
Makes 12 muffins, which is equivalent to two servings of six (2 x 6) muffins each. Each serving contains: 1 Bread, 1 Fruit, 1 Milk, 1 Protein, and 3/4 Vegetable. This no-fat recipe can also be made using Egg Beaters instead of eggs and Equal instead of Sweet 'n Low. It freezes well.
